retrieved_docs.title: Genetics, Chromosomes -- Molecular Level
retrieved_docs.content: Chromosomes can exist in the previously described tightly packed structure, referred to as heterochromatin, in which methylation of the DNA and other intermolecular forces keep the structure coiled and condensed. For transcription to occur with RNA polymerase and the other required proteins, the tight heterochromatin structure must unwrap to allow the transcription machinery to access the DNA strands. This looser structure with accessible DNA is referred to as euchromatin. [7] [8]

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 7 -- Level 3 -- Community 1354
retrieved_docs.content: Broxyquinoline is classified as a member of the hydroxyquinoline derivatives used for the treatment of amoebiasis and other protozoal diseases.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 0 -- Level 1 -- Community 86
retrieved_docs.content: antiparasitic, and supportive pharmacologic agents, highlighting shared mechanisms such as decreased protein synthesis, overlapping chemical families (imidazole, triazole, nitroimidazole), and dual therapeutic roles that are essential for informed therapeutic decision‑making and optimized patient care.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 21 -- Level 3 -- Community 2171
retrieved_docs.content: Unknown Cellular or Molecular Interaction [MoA] is characterized by having the mechanism of action of jodid draselný.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 2 -- Level 3 -- Community 1531
retrieved_docs.content: Benznidazole is a member of the nitroimidazole derivatives that function as antiprotozoal agents against leishmaniasis and trypanosomiasis, indicating its role within this drug class for treating these parasitic infections.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 32 -- Level 3 -- Community 1429
retrieved_docs.content: Nitroimidazole derivatives are antiprotozoal agents employed in the treatment of leishmaniasis and trypanosomiasis, and they are classified as agents against leishmaniasis and trypanosomiasis.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 6 -- Level 4 -- Community 2734
retrieved_docs.content: Kolagen serves as the parent classification for connective tissue proteins, indicating that connective tissue proteins are members of the kolagen family.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 4 -- Level 4 -- Community 2751
retrieved_docs.content: Quinoline derivatives and related substances that function as antitrematodals are classified as members of the praziquantel group, indicating that these quinoline‑based compounds share the pharmacologic characteristics of praziquantel and are used in the treatment of trematode infections.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 0 -- Level 3 -- Community 1590
retrieved_docs.content: Other infections, including parasitic infections, are classified as a subcategory under the broader parent disease group داء الريكتسيات.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 11 -- Level 2 -- Community 1046
retrieved_docs.content: Hydroxyquinoline derivatives for amoebiasis and other protozoal diseases are classified as members of the broxyquinoline group and are identified as agents used to treat amoebiasis and other protozoal infections. This categorization highlights their role as therapeutic compounds specifically targeting protozoal pathogens.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 1 -- Level 2 -- Community 362
retrieved_docs.content: Other bone disease and musculoskeletal deformities are associated with bone resorption, indicating that these conditions often involve increased breakdown of bone tissue, which contributes to skeletal weakening and structural abnormalities.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 10 -- Level 1 -- Community 67
retrieved_docs.content: antitrichomonal agents are connected to hachimycin, indicating a therapeutic or mechanistic association. Collectively, the taxonomy highlights that antiprotozoal agents are employed against parasites and single‑cell infections and have therapeutic relevance across bacterial, fungal, protozoal and parasitic diseases, providing a structured framework for clinical decision‑making and drug development.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 22 -- Level 3 -- Community 2434
retrieved_docs.content: Other ectoparasiticides, including scabicides in ATC, are classified as a subset of ectoparasiticides, including scabicides.

retrieved_docs.title: UMLS -- Run 9 -- Level 4 -- Community 2793
retrieved_docs.content: Antiparazitární látky are a class of antiparasitic agents used to treat infections caused by protozoa and helminths, and ornidazol is identified as a specific drug that belongs to this antiparasitic drug class.
